title: LunaKártes [LKCG] [JE-TCG]
description: A C.I.T. Pack that changes paper into cards for the LunaKártes game used in the Journey's End server!
body:
A C.I.T. Pack that changes paper into cards for the LunaKártes game, which functions similar to type-based games.

This pack was made for the Minecraft server of **[Journey's End](https://discord.com/invite/journeys-end)**

## Want Your Own Card?
Then just fill out the form!
### **[LunaKártes - Get Your Card](https://forms.gle/tGgdhPFSxDa7y5bj6)**
> - Only 1 Character Card is allowed per person, however, you are free to submit as many ideas as you'd like!
>   - Please understand that updates may take a short while, but we ensure that the content is notable!
>  - When submitting a card, absolutely NO AI is allowed. Your submission will be trashed.


## Credits!

**Owners**
> - **SlimeBoyo**
>   - Zentra Geuldy, Lord of **[Lunacharis](https://discord.gg/PRW9UF3665)**

>   - Galter Udo, Head of **[House Udo](https://discord.gg/kPkXmy4dc8)**

**Card Designers**

>   - (Check out their **[Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/slimeboyo)**)
> - **UppityBimbo** {ICON Designer}
>   - (Check out their **[Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/uppitybimbo)**)
> - Every person who submitted a character card / idea!
